description: Split the date-resolution machinery by direction. Rename the forward-looking resolveDate (cmd/bw/defer.go) to resolveDateAfterNow and update all call sites (create.go x2, update.go x2, defer.go, defer_test.go). Add a backward-looking mirror resolveDateBeforeNow that resolves expressions to the most recent PAST occurrence: YYYY-MM-DD/RFC3339 passthrough, 'yesterday', bare time (today-or-yesterday), 'N units'/'N units ago', 'last <weekday>'. Reuses existing helpers (parseTimeOfDay, parseWeekday, splitAtKeyword). Prerequisite for 'bw archive --before <cutoff>'.
title: Rename resolveDate -> resolveDateAfterNow; add resolveDateBeforeNow
